name: Pearl of Power
description: This pearl has 3 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge to regain one expended spell slot. The spell slot can be no higher than 5th level. The pearl regains all expended charges daily at dawn.
properties: Regain one expended spell slot (max 5th level)

name: Periapt of Health
description: Your Constitution score is 19 while you wear this periapt. It has no effect on you if your Constitution is 19 or higher without it.

name: Periapt of Proof Against Poison
description: While wearing this periapt, you have Advantage on saving throws against poison, and you have Immunity to poison damage.
properties: Advantage on saving throws vs poison

name: Periapt of Wound Closure
description: While wearing this periapt, you have Resistance to necrotic damage. You also have Advantage on Constitution saving throws made to stabilize dying creatures.
properties: Advantage on CON saves to stabilize dying creatures

name: Philter of Love
description: This potion appears to be a pink liquid. When you drink it, you become Charmed by the first creature you see within 30 feet of you for 1 hour. You have Advantage on Charisma (Persuasion) checks against that creature.
properties: Drink to become Charmed by first creature seen within 30 feet
Advantage on Persuasion checks vs charmed creature

name: Pipes of Haunting
description: While playing these pipes, you can cast Charm Person, Command, or Suggestion. The pipes have 7 charges and regains 1d7 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Pipes of the Sewers
description: While playing these pipes, you can cast Animate Dead or Speak with Dead. The pipes have 7 charges and regains 1d7 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Plate Armor of Etherealness
description: While wearing this armor, you can use your Reaction to become Ethereal for 1 minute. Once used, this property can't be used again until the next dawn.
properties: Become Ethereal for 1 minute as Reaction

name: Portable Hole
description: This circular piece of cloth can be unfolded to create a 10-foot-diameter hole that leads to an extradimensional space. The hole can be used to store objects or as an escape route.
properties: Can be folded back into cloth

name: Potion of Etherealness
description: When you drink this potion, you become Ethereal for 1 hour. You can end this effect early as a Magic action.
properties: Can end effect early as Magic action

name: Potion of Giant Strength (Black)
description: When you drink this potion, your Strength score becomes 25 for 1 hour. This is the strength of a Hill Giant.

name: Potion of Giant Strength (Frost)
description: When you drink this potion, your Strength score becomes 27 for 1 hour. This is the strength of a Frost Giant.

name: Potion of Giant Strength (Fire)
description: When you drink this potion, your Strength score becomes 29 for 1 hour. This is the strength of a Fire Giant.

name: Potion of Giant Strength (Cloud)
description: When you drink this potion, your Strength score becomes 31 for 1 hour. This is the strength of a Cloud Giant.

name: Potion of Giant Strength (Storm)
description: When you drink this potion, your Strength score becomes 33 for 1 hour. This is the strength of a Storm Giant.

name: Potion of Healing
description: When you drink this potion, you regain 2d4+2 Hit Points. The potion's effects depend on its rarity.

name: Potion of Heroism
description: When you drink this potion, you gain 10 temporary Hit Points and Advantage on saving throws against being Charmed or Frightened for 1 hour.
properties: Advantage on saves vs Charmed or Frightened for 1 hour

name: Potion of Invisibility
description: When you drink this potion, you become Invisible for 1 hour. The effect ends if you attack or cast a spell.
properties: Ends if you attack or cast a spell

name: Potion of Speed
description: When you drink this potion, your Speed doubles, and you can take a Bonus Action on each of your turns for 1 minute. You can end this effect early as a Magic action.
properties: Can take Bonus Action each turn for 1 minute
Can end effect early as Magic action

name: Potion of Vitality
description: When you drink this potion, you regain 10 Hit Points. If this potion reduces you to 0 Hit Points, you instead stabilize at 1 Hit Point.
properties: Stabilize at 1 HP if reduced to 0

name: Quaal's Feather Token (Bird)
description: This token can be thrown to create a Giant Eagle. The eagle obeys your commands for 1 hour.

name: Quaal's Feather Token (Blade)
description: This token can be thrown to create a +1 Longsword. The sword hovers in the air and can attack creatures.

name: Quaal's Feather Token (Fan)
description: This token can be thrown to create a cloud of scentless smoke in a 20-foot radius. The cloud obscures vision and can be commanded to move.

name: Quaal's Feather Token (Hippopotus)
description: This token can be thrown to create a Giant Hippopotamus. The hippopotamus obeys your commands for 1 hour.

name: Quaal's Feather Token (Snake)
description: This token can be thrown to create a Giant Constrictor Snake. The snake obeys your commands for 1 hour.

name: Quaal's Feather Token (Swan)
description: This token can be thrown to create a Giant Swan. The swan can carry you and others on its back for 1 hour.
properties: Can carry creatures on back for 1 hour

name: Quaal's Feather Token (Unicorn)
description: This token can be thrown to create a Unicorn. The unicorn obeys your commands for 1 hour.

name: Quaal's Feather Token (Winged Bear)
description: This token can be thrown to create a Giant Badger with wings. The bear obeys your commands for 1 hour.

name: Ring of Animal Influence
description: While wearing this ring, you can cast Animal Friendship or Speak with Animals. The ring has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Ring of Djinni Summoning
description: This ring has 3 charges. While wearing it, you can expend 1 charge to summon a Djinni. The Djinni obeys your commands for 1 hour.

name: Ring of Elemental Command (Air)
description: This ring allows you to command Air Elementals. You can cast Conjure Elemental to summon an Air Elemental.

name: Ring of Elemental Command (Earth)
description: This ring allows you to command Earth Elementals. You can cast Conjure Elemental to summon an Earth Elemental.

name: Ring of Elemental Command (Fire)
description: This ring allows you to command Fire Elementals. You can cast Conjure Elemental to summon a Fire Elemental.

name: Ring of Elemental Command (Water)
description: This ring allows you to command Water Elementals. You can cast Conjure Elemental to summon a Water Elemental.

name: Ring of Evasion
description: While wearing this ring, you have Advantage on Dexterity saving throws. When you make a Dexterity saving throw and take half damage on a successful save, you can take no damage instead.
properties: Take no damage on successful Dex saves

name: Ring of Feather Falling
description: This ring has 3 charges. While wearing it, you can cast Feather Falling on yourself or a creature you touch. The ring regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Ring of Free Action
description: While wearing this ring, you can cast Free Action on yourself once per day.
properties: Cast Free Action once per day

name: Ring of Invisibility
description: This ring has 3 charges. While wearing it, you can expend 1 charge to become Invisible for 1 hour. The ring regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Ring of Jumping
description: This ring has 3 charges. While wearing it, you can expend 1 charge to Cast Longjump or Highjump. The ring regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Ring of Mind Shielding
description: While wearing this ring, you are immune to being Charmed or Frightened. Your thoughts can't be read or perceived through magical means.
properties: Thoughts can't be read or perceived

name: Ring of Protection
description: While wearing this ring, you gain a +1 bonus to Armor Class and saving throws.
properties: +1 bonus to AC and saving throws

name: Ring of Regeneration
description: While wearing this ring, you regain 1d6 Hit Points every 10 minutes. If you lose a body part, the ring causes it to grow back after 1d10 days.
properties: Regrow lost body parts after 1d10 days

name: Ring of Resistance (Air)
description: While wearing this ring, you have Resistance to Lightning damage.

name: Ring of Resistance (Cold)
description: While wearing this ring, you have Resistance to Cold damage.

name: Ring of Resistance (Fire)
description: While wearing this ring, you have Resistance to Fire damage.

name: Ring of Resistance (Force)
description: While wearing this ring, you have Resistance to Force damage.

name: Ring of Resistance (Necrotic)
description: While wearing this ring, you have Resistance to Necrotic damage.

name: Ring of Resistance (Poison)
description: While wearing this ring, you have Resistance to Poison damage.

name: Ring of Resistance (Psychic)
description: While wearing this ring, you have Resistance to Psychic damage.

name: Ring of Resistance (Thunder)
description: While wearing this ring, you have Resistance to Thunder damage.

name: Ring of Shooting Stars
description: This ring has 7 charges. While wearing it, you can expend 1 charge to cast Burning Hands, Fog Cloud, or Web. You can also cast Moonbeam by expending 2 charges. The ring regains 1d7 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Ring of Spell Storing
description: This ring stores spells cast into it. When you wear the ring, you can cast any stored spell from it. The ring can store up to 5 levels of spells.
properties: Stores up to 5 levels of spells

name: Ring of Spell Turning
description: This ring has 3 charges. While wearing it, you can expend 1 charge to reflect a spell back at its caster. The ring regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Ring of Swimming
description: While wearing this ring, you have a Swim Speed of 40 feet.

name: Ring of Telekinesis
description: This ring has 3 charges. While wearing it, you can expend 1 charge to cast Telekinesis. The ring regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Ring of Three Wishes
description: This ring has 3 charges. While wearing it, you can expend 1 charge to cast Wish. The ring loses its properties after the third wish is made.

name: Ring of Warmth
description: While wearing this ring, you have Resistance to Cold damage and can tolerate temperatures of 0 degrees Fahrenheit or lower.

name: Ring of Water Walking
description: This ring has 3 charges. While wearing it, you can expend 1 charge to cast Water Walk on yourself or a creature you touch. The ring regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Robe of Eyes
description: While wearing this robe, you have Truesight with a range of 30 feet. You also have Advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.
properties: Advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks relying on sight

name: Robe of Scintillating Colors
description: This robe can change color to match its wearer's surroundings. While wearing it, you have Advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks to hide.
properties: Advantage on Stealth checks to hide

name: Robe of Stars
description: This robe is embroidered with stars that twinkle and shift. While wearing it, you have Advantage on Intelligence (Arcana) checks and Wisdom (Insight) checks.

name: Robe of the Archmagi
description: This robe grants you a +2 bonus to Armor Class. You have Advantage on Intelligence checks made to identify magical items. You can cast various spells from the robe.
attunement_requirements: Requires Attunement by a Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard
properties: Advantage on Intelligence checks to identify magical items

name: Rod of Absorption
description: This staff has 50 charges. While holding it, you have Resistance to Fire, Lightning, and Acid damage. You can absorb spell effects into the rod.
attunement_requirements: Requires Attunement by a Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard
properties: Resistance to Fire, Lightning, and Acid

name: Rod of Alertness
description: This staff has 3 charges. While holding it, you have Advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing. You can cast Alarm once per day.
properties: Advantage on Perception checks relying on hearing

name: Rod of Lordly Might
description: This staff can be wielded as a magic Quarterstaff that grants a +2 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with it. It has various magical properties.
properties: +2 to attack rolls and damage rolls

name: Rod of Resurrection
description: This staff has 5 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge to cast Raise Dead or Resurrection. The staff regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.
attunement_requirements: Requires Attunement by a Cleric or Druid
